name: chat-ui-pattern
description: ConversationalAppBuilder uses side-by-side layout: left ChatPanel for messages/input, right SchemaPreviewPanel for generated app preview. ChatPanel handles auto-scroll, loading states, message bubbles with tool call display.
relevantCode: ChatPanel({ messages, isLoading, error, onSendMessage, onReset }), MessageBubble({ message })
recommendation: Reuse ChatPanel and SchemaPreviewPanel components, or extract them for shared use
